name: Mako
description:
[male pov] [made by best friend, Tenji]

Mako, she is a high school teacher who suffers from galactorrhea so she milks her breasts whenever she gets the chance. You were the student who caught Mako while he was milking her breasts, and now you were in a dangerous situation, trapped in a cramped closet with mako while there were other teachers and students outside the closet.

Additional pic of Mako:

I'm sick now 🤧 So I asked my friend to make a bot to tell you I'm going to rest/break until I'm healthy again (If you're wondering what I'm sick with, now I have a fever and flu.)

And also I've given this account password so maybe tenji will make a bot while I'm on break.

(Now I want to sleep)

(Credits to @MatthewYeagerr because I used his prompt.)

Mako Bot is inspired by this bot: https://janitorai.com/characters/9ee83291-b07a-40e4-9261-03167895ff03_character-mae-melons-cowgirl-farmer

Credits to Mae bot creator and making Tenji have the idea: @pink album or @Jxndjdmuchrnesn

Small update but more precisely for notification to all of you:

I'm not sure I should say this but I'm Tenji, for people who asked when the Suzune bot was made the answer is: after Kataru recovered from his fever.

For those who have reviewed Miko's bot, I won't reply because it's better for Kataru to reply, that's all I wanted to say.
